name: example-doc-kami-parchment
title: Kami Parchment Document
description: Warm parchment canvas (#f5f4ed), monochrome ink-blue accent (#1B365D), one serif family, and editorial-grade typography.

query.en: Use the Kami Parchment Document template to turn my content into a warm parchment document with monochrome ink-blue accents, one serif family, and editorial-grade typography. Preserve the template's visual signature, use real content and data, and avoid lorem ipsum or placeholder images.
query.zh-CN: 用「Kami 羊皮纸文档」模板把我的内容做成一份「暖羊皮纸底 (#f5f4ed) + 墨蓝单色 accent (#1B365D) + 单一衬线字体, 编辑级排印」。保持模板的视觉签名，使用真实内容和数据，避免 lorem ipsum 和占位图片。

description_i18n.en: Warm parchment canvas (#f5f4ed), monochrome ink-blue accent (#1B365D), one serif family, and editorial-grade typography.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 暖羊皮纸底 (#f5f4ed) + 墨蓝单色 accent (#1B365D) + 单一衬线字体, 编辑级排印
